modules.module_title: Introduction to Access Control & Security Basics
Types of Access Control Systems & Components

questions.question: Security personnel ki primary duty kya hai gate par?

options.B: Unauthorized entry ko rokna

questions.explanation: Security personnel ki primary duty unauthorized व्यक्तियों या वस्तुओं को premises में enter hone se rokna hai, thereby ensuring security.

questions.question: Access control ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Security cameras install karna
options.C: Kise, kab aur kahan enter hone ki permission hai, yeh regulate karna

questions.explanation: Access control ka main purpose authorized individuals ko hi specific areas mein entry dena aur unauthorized individuals ko rokna hai, ensuring safety and security.

questions.question: Restricted area ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Jahan sirf authorized logon ko hi jaane ki permission hai
options.D: Jahan loud music allowed nahi hai

questions.explanation: Restricted area woh jagah hoti hai jahan security reasons ki wajah se sirf authorized personnel ko hi entry di jaati hai.

questions.question: Gate management ka key objective kya hai?

options.A: Visitors ko free snacks provide karna
options.B: Smooth flow of entry/exit maintain karna aur security ensure karna
options.D: Sabhi vehicles ko bina check kiye enter hone dena

questions.explanation: Gate management ka mukhya uddeshya entry aur exit processes ko smoothly handle karna hai, saath hi security standards ko maintain karna.

questions.question: ID verification kyun important hai gate par?

options.A: Logon ke naam yaad rakhne ke liye
options.B: Yeh confirm karne ke liye ki person authorized hai ya nahi
options.D: Kisi ko bhi enter hone dene ke liye

questions.explanation: ID verification se yeh confirm hota hai ki enter karne wala vyakti authorized hai aur uske paas premises mein jaane ki permission hai.

questions.question: Security logbook mein kya record karna chahiye?

options.B: Sirf important phone numbers
options.C: Visitor details, entry/exit times, vehicle numbers

questions.explanation: Security logbook mein sabhi entry/exit details, visitors, vehicles aur koi bhi incident record karna zaroori hai for accountability and record-keeping.

questions.question: Security breach kya hota hai?

options.A: Jab koi gate khula chhod deta hai
options.B: Jab koi unauthorized person restricted area mein enter karta hai
options.D: Jab koi phone bhool jaata hai

questions.explanation: Security breach tab hota hai jab koi unauthorized vyakti ya action security protocols ko bypass karke restricted area mein enter karta hai ya security ko compromise karta hai.

questions.question: Physical security mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Firewalls aur antivirus software
options.C: Gates, fences, security guards, CCTV cameras

questions.explanation: Physical security mein woh sabhi measures shamil hote hain jo physical assets aur premises ko unauthorized access, damage ya theft se bachate hain, jaise gates, fences, guards aur surveillance systems.

questions.question: Unauthorised entry ko rokne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Sabko bina check kiye andar aane dena
options.B: Har person aur vehicle ki proper verification aur checking karna

questions.explanation: Unauthorized entry ko rokne ke liye, har person aur vehicle ki proper identification aur verification karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Security guard ki responsibilities mein kya shamil nahi hai?

options.B: Incident report likhna
options.C: Company ke employees ko salary dena

questions.explanation: Company ke employees ko salary dena security guard ki responsibility nahi hai; yeh HR ya Accounts department ka kaam hai.

questions.question: Security policy ka palan karna kyun mahatvapurna hai?

options.B: Security risks ko minimize karne aur compliance ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Apni marzi se kaam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Security policy ka palan karna zaroori hai taaki sabhi security protocols follow ho, risks kam hon aur legal/regulatory requirements poore hon.

questions.question: Ek effective access control system mein kya qualities honi chahiye?

options.B: Reliable, efficient aur user-friendly ho

questions.explanation: Ek effective access control system reliable hona chahiye taaki woh consistently kaam kare, efficient ho taaki processes smooth hon, aur user-friendly ho taaki use karna aasan ho.

questions.question: CCTV monitoring ka primary role kya hai security mein?

options.B: Surveillance aur evidence collection

questions.explanation: CCTV monitoring ka primary role areas ki surveillance karna, incidents record karna aur future investigation ke liye evidence provide karna hai.

questions.question: Confidential information ko kaise protect karna chahiye?

options.B: Secure location mein store karke aur limited access dekar
options.C: Public notice board par laga kar

questions.explanation: Confidential information ko secure location mein store karna aur sirf authorized individuals ko hi access dena uski protection ke liye mahatvapurna hai.

questions.question: Risk assessment ka kya matlab hai security ke context mein?

options.B: Potential threats aur vulnerabilities ko identify aur evaluate karna
options.D: Security equipment ki price check karna

questions.explanation: Risk assessment ka matlab hai potential security threats ko pehchanna, unki vulnerabilities ko evaluate karna aur unke impact ko analyse karna taaki unhe minimize kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Security awareness training kyun di jaati hai?

options.A: Employees ko bore karne ke liye
options.B: Employees ko security risks aur best practices ke baare mein educate karne ke liye
options.D: Company ke rules bhulane ke liye

questions.explanation: Security awareness training employees ko security threats ko pehchanne aur unse bachne ke tarike sikhane ke liye di jaati hai, jisse overall security improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Security post par duty ke dauraan 'vigilance' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Har samay alert aur attentive rehna, surroundings par nazar rakhna

questions.explanation: 'Vigilance' ka matlab hai har samay alert aur attentive rehna, apne surroundings par nazar rakhna taaki kisi bhi suspicious activity ya incident ko turant identify aur address kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Manual access control ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Boom barrier
options.C: Guard dwara ID check aur register entry

questions.explanation: Manual access control mein human intervention shamil hota hai, jaise security guard ka ID check karna aur logbook mein entry karna.

questions.question: Biometric access control kya hai?

options.B: Physical key use karne wala system
options.C: Individual ki unique physical characteristics (jaise fingerprint) se access control

questions.explanation: Biometric access control mein fingerprint, retina scan ya face recognition jaise unique biological traits ka use hota hai authentication ke liye.

questions.question: RFID card ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Rapid File Identification

questions.explanation: RFID ka full form Radio Frequency Identification hai, jo radio waves ka use karke information transmit karta hai.

questions.question: Key card system kaise kaam karta hai?

options.A: Door ko remote se unlock karta hai
options.B: Card ko reader par swipe ya tap karke access grant karta hai
options.C: Voice commands se operate hota hai
options.D: Fingerprint scan se unlock hota hai

questions.explanation: Key card system mein, ek encoded card ko card reader par present kiya jaata hai, jo authorized hone par door unlock karta hai.

questions.question: Turnstile gate kahan use hota hai?

options.B: Pedestrian (paidal chalne wale) entry/exit ko control karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Turnstile gates pedestrians ki entry aur exit ko control karte hain, ek samay mein ek hi vyakti ko guzarne dete hain.

questions.question: CCTV ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Closed-Circuit Television

questions.explanation: CCTV ka full form Closed-Circuit Television hai, jo surveillance ke liye video signals ko limited set of monitors tak transmit karta hai.

questions.question: Access control system mein 'credential' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Access grant karne ke liye use ki jaane wali cheez (jaise ID card, fingerprint)

questions.explanation: Credential woh item ya information hai jo kisi vyakti ko access control system mein authenticate karti hai, jaise ID card, fingerprint, ya PIN.

questions.question: Biometric system mein kaun sa feature use hota hai?

options.B: Magnetic strip on card

questions.explanation: Biometric systems unique physical characteristics jaise fingerprint, facial patterns, iris scans, ya voice prints ka use karte hain identification ke liye.

questions.question: Proximity card reader ki range kitni hoti hai?

options.B: Long-range (5-10 meters)

questions.explanation: Proximity card readers typically short-range hote hain, jahan card ko reader ke bahut paas laya jaata hai access ke liye.

questions.question: Aadhar card-based access control ka fayda kya hai?

options.A: Duplicate IDs ban banana aasan hai
options.B: Highly secure aur unique identification provide karta hai

questions.explanation: Aadhar card-based access control unique biometric identification provide karta hai, jisse security aur authenticity badhti hai aur duplication mushkil ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Door sensor ka kya kaam hai access control mein?

options.B: Door ke open ya close hone ki status detect karna

questions.explanation: Door sensor security system ko yeh batata hai ki door khula hai ya band, jisse unauthorized entry attempts ko detect kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Electric strike lock kaise operate hota hai?

options.B: Electric current se latch ko release karke

questions.explanation: Electric strike lock electrical current apply hone par door latch ko release karta hai, allowing entry. Power cut hone par yeh fail-safe ya fail-secure ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Magnetic lock (Maglock) ka principle kya hai?

options.A: Sound waves se lock hota hai
options.B: Electromagnetism se door ko hold karta hai
options.C: Mechanical gears se lock hota hai

questions.explanation: Magnetic lock mein ek electromagnet aur armature plate hoti hai. Current flow hone par electromagnet door ko strongly hold karta hai, aur current cut hone par unlock ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Networked access control system ke kya benefits hain?

options.A: Sirf ek door control karta hai
options.B: Centralized management, real-time monitoring aur remote access provide karta hai

questions.explanation: Networked access control system multiple doors aur locations ko ek central software se manage karta hai, real-time status deta hai aur remote control ki facility deta hai.

questions.question: Standalone access control system ki limitations kya hain?

options.A: Bahut saare doors ko ek saath manage kar sakta hai
options.B: Real-time monitoring aur centralized control provide karta hai
options.C: Limited scalability, manual data management aur no remote control

questions.explanation: Standalone systems ek single door ko control karte hain, unhe manually program karna padta hai aur unme centralized monitoring ya remote access nahi hota.

questions.question: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) kya hai aur kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Access ke liye do ya do se zyada verification methods use karna, security badhane ke liye
options.D: Kisi bhi factor ka use na karna

questions.explanation: MFA mein multiple verification methods (jaise something you know - password, something you have - card, something you are - fingerprint) ka use hota hai, jisse unauthorized access ke chances bahut kam ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Wiegand protocol kis liye use hota hai access control mein?

options.B: Card readers aur access control panels ke beech data communication ke liye

questions.explanation: Wiegand protocol ek standard communication method hai jo card readers se access control panels tak credential data transmit karta hai.

questions.question: Gate par entry ke liye pehla step kya hai kisi unknown person ka?

options.B: Uski identity verify karna

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi unknown person ko premises mein enter hone se pehle uski identity verify karna sabse pehla aur mahatvapurna step hai.

questions.question: Visitor ko kaun sa document dikhana chahiye entry ke liye?

options.B: Valid government ID (Aadhar, Driving License)

questions.explanation: Visitor ko apni identity prove karne ke liye ek valid government ID card dikhana chahiye.

questions.question: Security logbook mein kya record karte hain visitor entry ke liye?

options.B: Visitor ka naam, contact, purpose of visit, entry/exit time

questions.explanation: Logbook mein visitor ka complete record maintain karna zaroori hai for security aur accountability purposes.

questions.question: Exit karte time kya check karna chahiye visitor ka?

options.B: Uska visitor pass return hua hai ya nahi aur exit time record karna
options.C: Uske kapde clean hain ya nahi

questions.explanation: Exit ke time visitor pass collect karna aur exit time record karna zaroori hai taaki premises mein kaun kab tak raha, iska record rahe.

questions.question: Delivery vehicles ko kaise manage karte hain gate par?

options.A: Bina check kiye andar aane dena
options.B: Vehicle aur driver ke documents check karna, delivery details verify karna

questions.explanation: Delivery vehicles ki proper checking aur delivery details verify karna zaroori hai taaki unauthorized goods ya persons ko entry na mile.

questions.question: Staff entry procedure kya hai?

options.A: Bina kisi ID ke enter hona
options.B: Valid employee ID card swipe/tap karke enter hona

questions.explanation: Staff ko apni official ID card ka use karke access control system se authenticate ho kar enter hona chahiye.

questions.question: Gate par suspicious activity dikhe toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant apne supervisor ko inform karna aur instructions follow karna

questions.explanation: Suspicious activity dikhne par turant supervisor ko inform karna aur unke instructions follow karna zaroori hai taaki proper response diya ja sake.

questions.question: Vehicle inspection procedures mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Vehicle ke interior ki checking, undercarriage mirror se check, boot/dicky check
options.C: Vehicle ke tyres ki air pressure check karna
options.D: Vehicle ka music system check karna

questions.explanation: Vehicle inspection mein vehicle ke har part ko check karna shamil hai taaki koi unauthorized item ya person hide na ho.

questions.question: Material inward/outward gate pass ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Material ke movement ko authorize aur track karna

questions.explanation: Gate pass material ke official movement ko authorize karta hai aur iska record maintain karta hai, thereby preventing theft ya unauthorized movement.

questions.question: Shift change ke time gate security guard ki kya responsibility hoti hai?

options.A: Apni shift khatam karke ghar chale jaana
options.B: Duty charge ko proper handover dena, incidents aur pending tasks ki report karna
options.C: Naye guard ko instruct na karna

questions.explanation: Proper handover mein pending tasks, significant events, aur koi bhi critical information naye guard ko provide karna zaroori hai for continuity.

questions.question: Visitor pass issue karte waqt kaun si information verify karte hain?

options.B: Visitor ka naam, company, contact person, ID proof details

questions.explanation: Visitor pass issue karte waqt visitor ki basic personal details, kis se milne aaye hain, aur unka ID proof verify karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: VIP movement ke liye kya special procedures hote hain?

options.B: Pre-planned entry, dedicated escort, enhanced security checks

questions.explanation: VIP movement ke liye special protocols follow kiye jaate hain, jisme pre-planning, dedicated security aur smooth passage ensure karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Gate par emergency vehicle (e.g., ambulance, fire truck) ko kaise handle karte hain?

options.B: Turant clear passage dena aur help karna

questions.explanation: Emergency vehicles ko turant aur bina kisi rukawat ke passage dena chahiye, kyunki unki speed life-saving ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Gate par traffic management kaise karte hain?

options.A: Vehicles ko randomly enter hone dena
options.B: Signage, boom barriers, aur clear instructions se vehicles ko regulate karna

questions.explanation: Effective traffic management ke liye clear signage, proper lane discipline, aur boom barriers ka use karna zaroori hai taaki smooth aur safe flow ensure ho.

questions.question: Gate par conflict resolution kaise handle karte hain?

options.B: Calm rehkar situation ko de-escalate karna, rules explain karna aur supervisor ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Conflict resolution mein calm rehna, active listening karna, rules ko clearly explain karna aur zaroorat padne par supervisor ki help lena shamil hai.

questions.question: Kisi unauthorized person ko entry deny karne ke liye kya process follow karna chahiye?

options.B: Politely reason batana, entry deny karna aur supervisor ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Entry deny karte waqt polite rehna, reason batana aur supervisor ko inform karna zaroori hai taaki situation professionally handle ho aur koi escalation na ho.

questions.question: Gate security par data privacy rules (e.g., GDPR) ka kya impact hai?

options.B: Visitor data ko collect, store aur process karte waqt strict privacy norms follow karna
options.D: Data collect karna band kar dena

questions.explanation: Data privacy rules ke तहत visitor data ko collect, store aur process karte waqt unki privacy ka dhyan rakhna, consent lena aur data security ensure karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Visitor management system ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Visitors ko track karna, security badhana aur visitor experience improve karna

questions.explanation: Visitor management system visitors ki details record karta hai, unki movement ko track karta hai aur overall security aur experience ko enhance karta hai.

questions.question: Temporary visitor pass kaun issue karta hai?

options.B: Security personnel at the gate

questions.explanation: Security personnel authorized hote hain temporary visitor passes issue karne ke liye after proper verification.

questions.question: Vehicle entry ke liye kya document required hai?

options.B: Vehicle registration (RC), Driving License

questions.explanation: Vehicle entry ke liye vehicle registration document aur driver ka valid driving license check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Parking area mein vehicles ko kaise park karana chahiye?

options.B: Designated parking spots mein systematically park karana
options.C: Emergency exit ke saamne park karna

questions.explanation: Vehicles ko designated spots par systematically park karana chahiye taaki traffic flow smooth rahe aur emergency access block na ho.

questions.question: Contractor/Vendor ke employees ko kaise manage karte hain?

options.A: Unko bina permission kaam karne dena
options.B: Unki company ID, work permit check karna aur temporary passes issue karna
options.D: Unko company ke secret documents dena

questions.explanation: Contractor/Vendor employees ki proper identification aur work permit verification ke baad hi unhe entry deni chahiye.

questions.question: Guest ko company premises mein kaun escort karta hai?

options.B: Jis employee se milne aaye hain, ya designated escort

questions.explanation: Visitors ko designated person ya jisse milne aaye hain, wahi escort karte hain taaki woh unauthorized areas mein na jaayen.

questions.question: Parking lot mein unauthorized parking par kya action lenge?

options.B: Warning issue karna, vehicle tow karwana ya fine lagana as per policy

questions.explanation: Unauthorized parking se traffic flow aur emergency access block ho sakta hai, isliye policy ke according action lena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Visitor register mein kaun si details record karna mandatory hai?

options.B: Visitor ka full name, contact number, purpose of visit, entry/exit time, ID proof details

questions.explanation: Visitor register mein complete details record karna mandatory hai for security, record-keeping aur emergency situations.

questions.question: Vehicle inspection mein kya-kya check karte hain?

options.B: Undercarriage, boot, glove compartment, passenger area for suspicious items

questions.explanation: Vehicle inspection mein hidden compartments aur suspicious items ki talash karna shamil hai taaki koi unauthorized goods ya threats enter na ho sake.

questions.question: Material movement ke liye gate pass mein kya details honi chahiye?

options.B: Material description, quantity, sender/receiver details, authorization signature

questions.explanation: Gate pass mein complete details honi chahiye taaki material ka movement authorized ho aur uski proper tracking ho sake.

questions.question: Digital visitor management system ke kya fayde hain?

options.B: Faster check-in, automated record-keeping, enhanced security features

questions.explanation: Digital systems efficiency badhate hain, manual errors kam karte hain aur better security features offer karte hain jaise instant visitor alerts.

questions.question: Vehicle search karte waqt kin baaton ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Politeness, thoroughness, driver ki presence mein search, privacy ka dhyan rakhna

questions.explanation: Vehicle search karte waqt professional conduct maintain karna, driver ki privacy ka dhyan rakhna aur thorough search karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Lost visitor pass ko kaise handle karte hain?

options.B: Visitor se report karwane ko kehna, record check karna aur new pass issue karna ya exit allow karna after verification
options.D: Visitor ko bina pass ke ghumne dena

questions.explanation: Lost pass ki situation mein proper procedure follow karna zaroori hai taaki unauthorized exit ya pass ka misuse na ho.

questions.question: Large-scale event ke liye visitor management kaise plan karte hain?

options.B: Pre-registration, multiple entry points, dedicated staff, clear signage aur emergency plan
options.D: Sabko ek hi gate se entry dena

questions.explanation: Large events ke liye comprehensive planning zaroori hai taaki crowd control ho, security maintain ho aur processes smooth hon.

questions.question: Vehicle access control system ko kaise integrate kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Boom barriers, RFID readers, CCTV aur software ko ek saath connect karke

questions.explanation: Integrated systems mein various components (barriers, readers, cameras) ko ek central software se connect kiya jaata hai for seamless and efficient vehicle management.

questions.question: Visitor data protection (GDPR/Data Privacy) norms ka kya impact hai?

options.A: Visitor data ko kaise bhi use kar sakte hain
options.B: Visitor data ko collect, store aur process karne ke liye strict rules aur consent requirements follow karna
options.C: Visitor data collect karna band kar dena
options.D: Visitor data public domain mein release karna

questions.explanation: Data privacy norms ke तहत visitor data ko secure rakhna, unka consent lena aur unke rights ka dhyan rakhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Emergency mein vehicles ko evacuate karne ka procedure kya hai?

options.A: Vehicles ko parking mein chhod dena
options.B: Pre-defined evacuation routes, clear instructions aur designated assembly points for vehicles
options.C: Sab vehicles ko ek saath bahar nikalna

questions.explanation: Emergency evacuation plan mein vehicles ke liye specific routes aur instructions hone chahiye taaki orderly aur safe evacuation ho sake.

questions.question: Fire alarm bajne par pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Nearest emergency exit se evacuate karna

questions.explanation: Fire alarm bajne par sabse pehle safety ke liye building ko immediately evacuate karna chahiye using nearest emergency exits.

questions.question: Emergency exit routes ki importance kya hai?

options.B: Emergency mein safe aur quick evacuation provide karna

questions.explanation: Emergency exit routes jaan bachane ke liye mahatvapurna hain, yeh safe aur fast evacuation ka rasta provide karte hain.

questions.question: First Aid box kahan milta hai?

options.B: Designated easily accessible location (e.g., reception, security room)

questions.explanation: First Aid box hamesha ek easily accessible aur clearly marked location par hona chahiye for immediate medical assistance.

questions.question: Bomb threat ki situation mein kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant supervisor aur police ko inform karna, evacuation procedure follow karna

questions.explanation: Bomb threat ek highly critical situation hai, jisme turant authorities ko inform karna aur evacuation plan follow karna sabse zaroori hai.

questions.question: Medical emergency mein kisko contact karna chahiye?

options.B: Emergency medical services (ambulance), supervisor

questions.explanation: Medical emergency mein turant professional medical help (ambulance) aur apne supervisor ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Incident report kyun banaya jaata hai?

options.B: Incident ko document karne, analysis aur future prevention ke liye
options.C: Kisi ko blame karne ke liye
options.D: Kisi ko punish karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Incident report detailed record provide karta hai, jisse incident ko analyze kiya ja sake aur future mein aise incidents ko rokne ke liye measures liye ja sake.

questions.question: Power failure hone par gate security kaise maintain karte hain?

options.B: Manual operations, backup power (UPS/generator), aur increased vigilance

questions.explanation: Power failure ke dauraan backup systems aur manual procedures ka use karke security maintain karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Suspicious package dikhe toh kya action lenge?

options.B: Usko touch na karna, area ko secure karna aur authorities ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Suspicious package ko kabhi touch nahi karna chahiye, area ko secure karke turant authorities ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Evacuation procedure mein assembly point ka kya role hai?

options.B: Evacuated logon ke liye safe gathering point, jahan count kiya ja sake

questions.explanation: Assembly point woh designated safe area hota hai jahan sabhi evacuated log gather hote hain aur unki counting ki jaati hai taaki koi missing na ho.

questions.question: Aggressive visitor ko kaise handle karte hain?

options.B: Calmly baat karna, de-escalate karna, rules explain karna aur zaroorat padne par help call karna

questions.explanation: Aggressive situations mein calm rehna, professional tarike se baat karna aur zaroorat padne par backup mangna mahatvapurna hai.

questions.question: Incident report mein kaun si details record karte hain?

options.B: Date, time, location, type of incident, persons involved, actions taken, witnesses

questions.explanation: Incident report mein factual aur detailed information honi chahiye taaki accurate record maintain ho sake.

questions.question: Natural disaster (e.g., earthquake) ke case mein security guard ki responsibilities kya hain?

options.B: Logon ko guide karna, evacuation mein help karna, property ko secure karna

questions.explanation: Natural disaster mein security guards ki role critical hoti hai logon ki safety ensure karne aur property ko further damage se bachane mein.

questions.question: Hostage situation ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Situation ko contain karna, turant police aur command center ko inform karna, khud se action na lena

questions.explanation: Hostage situation ek high-risk scenario hai, jisme primary action authorities ko inform karna aur unke instructions follow karna hota hai.

questions.question: Active shooter scenario mein security personnel ki kya role hoti hai?

options.A: Shooter ko rokne ki koshish karna
options.B: ALICE (Alert, Lockdown, Inform, Counter, Evacuate) principles follow karna, logon ko guide karna, police ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Active shooter situations mein security personnel ko ALICE protocol follow karna chahiye, logon ki safety ensure karna aur law enforcement ko support karna.

questions.question: Incident response plan (IRP) ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Incidents ko effectively manage aur resolve karne ke liye detailed steps provide karna
options.D: Sirf bade incidents ke liye plan banana

questions.explanation: IRP ek structured approach provide karta hai incidents ko handle karne ke liye, jisse response time kam hota hai aur damage minimize hota hai.

questions.question: Post-incident analysis (PIA) kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Incident ke causes, response aur outcomes ko evaluate karna, lessons learn karna aur improvements identify karna
options.C: Kisi ko blame karne ke liye
options.D: Incidents ko bhool jaane ke liye

questions.explanation: PIA se future incidents ko rokne ke liye valuable insights milte hain aur security protocols ko improve kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Hand-held metal detector (HHMD) ka use kya hai?

options.B: Persons ki body par hidden metal objects detect karna

questions.explanation: HHMD ka use logon ki body ya belongings par chhupi hui metal ki cheezein (jaise weapons) detect karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: CCTV monitor par kya dekhte hain?

options.B: Live video feed of surveillance areas

questions.explanation: CCTV monitor par security personnel surveillance areas ki real-time video feed dekhte hain taaki koi suspicious activity detect ki ja sake.

questions.question: Walk-through metal detector (WTMD) kahan use hota hai?

options.B: High-security entry points (e.g., airports, government buildings)

questions.explanation: WTMD ka use high-security locations par large number of people ki quick screening ke liye hota hai taaki hidden metal objects detect kiye ja sake.

questions.question: Two-way radio communication ka fayda kya hai?

options.B: Security team ke members ke beech quick aur effective communication

questions.explanation: Two-way radio security team ko real-time communication provide karta hai, jisse coordination aur response time improve hota hai.

questions.question: Boom barrier ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Vehicle entry aur exit ko control karna

questions.explanation: Boom barrier vehicles ki entry aur exit ko physically regulate karta hai, unauthorized vehicles ko rokta hai.

questions.question: Access control software mein kya manage karte hain?

options.B: User credentials, access levels, schedules aur event logs

questions.explanation: Access control software system ke saare parameters ko centrally manage karta hai, jisse flexibility aur security badhti hai.

questions.question: Intruder alarm system kaise kaam karta hai?

options.B: Sensors se unauthorized entry detect karta hai aur alarm trigger karta hai

questions.explanation: Intruder alarm system motion sensors, door/window contacts ka use karke unauthorized entry detect karta hai aur ek alarm bajata hai ya alert bhejta hai.

questions.question: Biometric scanner ki maintenance kaise karte hain?

options.B: Lens ko regularly clean karna, software updates aur calibration check karna

questions.explanation: Biometric scanners ki proper functioning ke liye regular cleaning, software updates aur calibration zaroori hai.

questions.question: Under Vehicle Surveillance System (UVSS) ka purpose kya hai?

options.B: Vehicle ke undercarriage ki inspection karna for hidden objects

questions.explanation: UVSS vehicles ke undercarriage ki high-resolution images capture karta hai taaki explosives, weapons ya contrabands ko detect kiya ja sake.

questions.question: X-ray baggage scanner ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Baggage ke andar ke contents ko detect karna without opening it

questions.explanation: X-ray scanners baggage ke andar ke contents ki images generate karte hain, jisse suspicious items (jaise weapons, explosives) ko detect kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Video analytics ka security mein kya use hai?

options.B: CCTV footage mein specific patterns, movements ya anomalies ko automatically detect karna

questions.explanation: Video analytics software CCTV footage ko analyze karta hai aur pre-defined rules ke hisab se suspicious activities (jaise unattended baggage, loitering) ko automatically identify karta hai.

questions.question: Perimeter security systems mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Fences, walls, perimeter intrusion detection systems (PIDS), outdoor CCTV

questions.explanation: Perimeter security systems property ki outer boundary ko protect karte hain, jisse unauthorized entry ko bahar hi roka ja sake.

questions.question: Integrated Security Management System (ISMS) ke kya benefits hain?

options.B: Multiple security systems (access control, CCTV, alarms) ko ek platform se manage karna, better coordination, faster response
options.D: Bahut zyada manual effort lagta hai

questions.explanation: ISMS sabhi security components ko ek saath integrate karta hai, jisse unified view aur better control milta hai, aur response time significantly improve hota hai.

questions.question: Drone surveillance ka security mein kya role ho sakta hai?

options.B: Large areas ki aerial monitoring, rapid response to incidents, border security

questions.explanation: Drones large areas ki real-time aerial surveillance provide karte hain, jo difficult-to-reach areas ko monitor karne aur incidents par turant respond karne mein helpful hain.

questions.question: AI-based security solutions gate management mein kaise help karte hain?

options.B: Automated face recognition, vehicle plate recognition, anomaly detection aur predictive analysis

questions.explanation: AI-based solutions gate management ko automate aur enhance karte hain, jisse identification, verification aur threat detection zyada efficient aur accurate ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Cybersecurity risks access control systems ko kaise affect kar sakte hain?

options.A: System ko zyada secure banate hain
options.B: Unauthorized access, data breach, system tampering aur operational disruption

questions.explanation: Cybersecurity risks networked access control systems ko hack hone, data chori hone ya system ko disable karne ka threat dete hain, jisse physical security bhi compromise ho sakti hai.
